element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Tutorial level introduces player to first-person perspective and navigation
Encouraged as alternative to direct combat; unlocked through skill progression
Core gameplay system allowing multiple playstyle approaches; unlocked gradually through story and resource acquisition
Character development tied to player choices and augmentation selection

element_introduction_order.element: Conspiracy narrative and multiple faction intrigue
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Drives level design and branching paths; player uncovers through exploration and dialogue
Rewards exploration and alternative approaches; supports multiple playstyle solutions

typical_tension_triggers: Multiple solution pathways creating decision pressure
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Player-driven pacing with environmental tension; allows for methodical exploration between encounter clusters; sandbox-like level design emphasizes player agency over scripted rhythm

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Hidden areas and alternative routes rewarded through exploration; vertical and horizontal branching paths suggest optional content
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Non-obvious passages and destructible surfaces; reward thorough environmental investigation

difficulty_curve.early_game: Tutorial-paced introduction to stealth and combat mechanics; player builds familiarity with augmentation system and multiple solution pathways
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalating enemy complexity and scenario difficulty; conspiracy unfolding introduces moral and tactical complexity alongside mechanical challenges
difficulty_curve.late_game: High-complexity scenarios requiring integrated use of augmentations, stealth, and combat; faction consequences affect available solutions
notable_spikes: First major combat encounter introduces enemy AI threat
Mid-game faction pressure points force playstyle decisions
Late-game conspiracy revelation raises stakes and challenge

notable_level_patterns.description: Central safe zones (hubs) connect to multiple objective areas with distinct environmental challenges; non-linear approach options between objectives
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Hong Kong locations and New York City areas

notable_level_patterns.description: Single objectives solvable through stealth, combat, augmentation, dialogue, or environmental manipulation; no forced approach
Levels utilize multiple elevations and routes; alternative paths reward vertical exploration and enable different approach angles
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Urban environments with buildings and rooftops

notable_level_patterns.description: Level access and solutions shift based on player allegiance choices; same areas become hostile or friendly depending on narrative decisions
